sections.biography-internet-researched: Gongsun Kang was the son and heir of Gongsun Du. Having been fortunate enough to inherit his father’s domain, Gongsun Kang continued consolidating power over the land that Gongsun Du had taken. In AD 207, the warlord Cao Cao had defeated the Wuhuan and the successors of Yuan Shao, Yuan Shang and Yuan Xi both fled to Gongsun Kang alongside the Wuhuan chief Supuyan. They asked for military assistance against Cao Cao. Once Cao Cao had retreated away from nearby Kang’s lands, however, Gongsun Kang put the two Yuans and Supuyan to death. Because Gongsun Kang sent the three heads to Cao Cao, he was awarded with the rank of ’Marquis of Xiangping.’

full_text:
Gongsun Kang 公孫康
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Gongsun Kang (公孫康)was born in Xiangping county, Liaodong commandery. Executed the Yuan sons, extended power in Korea and restored communication with Japan. Gongsun Kang was affiliated with Gongsun Du. Gongsun Kang lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.

Gongsun Kang or Any of Them
Date:05/2005Replies:11
BiographyInternet Researched
Gongsun Kang was the son and heir of Gongsun Du. Having been fortunate enough to inherit his father’s domain, Gongsun Kang continued consolidating power over the land that Gongsun Du had taken. In AD 207, the warlord Cao Cao had defeated the Wuhuan and the successors of Yuan Shao, Yuan Shang and Yuan Xi both fled to Gongsun Kang alongside the Wuhuan chief Supuyan. They asked for military assistance against Cao Cao. Once Cao Cao had retreated away from nearby Kang’s lands, however, Gongsun Kang put the two Yuans and Supuyan to death. Because Gongsun Kang sent the three heads to Cao Cao, he was awarded with the rank of ’Marquis of Xiangping.’
